properties.name: alert.admin-email
properties.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses that receive monitoring alerts. Defaults to spring.mail.username (self-send). Leave empty to suppress alert emails.

properties.name: alert.error-rate.threshold
properties.description: Number of HTTP 5xx errors in a 15-minute window that triggers an alert email.

properties.name: alert.heap-usage.threshold-percent
properties.description: JVM heap usage percentage that triggers an alert email.
